title: Read and send Gmail through connected Workspace
tokenSource: Telegram CEO web_fetch automatically attaches internal bearer auth for localhost API; no model-visible token

apiCalls.purpose: send new email after CEO confirmation
reply to existing thread after CEO confirmation

successProofs: send/reply response contains id or success marker
negativeTests: must block Gmail send when x-source-channel is Zalo
must require to, subject, and body for new email
must require id and body for replies
